calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-09-2007 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: 9:21am
Judge Pro Tem Jason Jungreis, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record:
Cause called for Small Claims appeal. Respondent, Eva Hall, appears in Pro Per; there is no appearance by Paul Seregin Pro Per in DBA Fine Timepiece.
The Court allows Mr. Seregin 20 minutes to appear in Court. Ms. Hall, previously sworn, testifies in the narrative. (The Court started a hearing another matter in the meantime.)
9:25am
Matter is submitted, evidence for the plaintiff/respondent is returned to her in open court. There is no evidence in the file to return to defendant/appellant.
